overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand gothic great hall with floating candles, long wooden dining tables, and students seated for a meal. The scene features warm candlelight illuminating stone architecture and stained glass windows, with a ghostly figure visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle great hall with floating candles and long dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated camera overlooking the dining hall from a balcony perspective

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure floating near the right wall, observing the hall

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air forming a chandelier-like canopy
large ornate stained glass window at the far end of the hall with blue and gold patterns
rows of long wooden tables with students seated, extending down the central aisle
tall gothic stone walls with arched windows and banners
tall gothic stone walls with arched windows and banners

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles overhead. Long wooden dining tables fill the space with seated students, while a large stained glass window dominates the far wall. A translucent ghostly figure floats near the right wall in the foreground, and the warm candlelight casts dramatic shadows across the stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a grand gothic great hall where warm candlelight creates a dramatic interplay of light and shadow. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, focusing on the hundreds of floating candles that illuminate the stone architecture from above. As the eye wanders through the space, the view encompasses long wooden dining tables filled with seated students, leading toward a massive stained glass window that dominates the far wall. The scene finally settles on a translucent ghostly figure floating near the right wall in the foreground, grounding the ethereal atmosphere of the hall.
